runtimeScope: local contract-backed fixture; not staging or production rollout evidence

baseline.note: The approved source remains canonical; no durable baseline was promoted without operator approval.

hierarchy.rationale: The composer is the single dominant decision surface; budget, library and viewer remain subordinate and immediately legible.

proportions.rationale: The editorial grid, composer and inspector preserve balanced proportions in the first fold and rich viewer.

rhythm.rationale: Control groups, candidate cards and inspector sections establish a consistent scan rhythm without card wallpaper.

density.rationale: The advanced controls remain compact while preserving labels, target sizes and progressive disclosure.

depth.rationale: Aurora, glass, stage lighting, focus and editing halos create clear depth without obscuring content.

surfaceEconomy.rationale: Composer, masonry and focused viewer each own one job; secondary evidence is contained in the inspector.

visualImpact.rationale: Distinct Globe lighting, official marks and rich media produce a premium first impression in both themes.

typography.rationale: Display, control, metadata and numeric tiers remain readable and retain hierarchy at 390 px.

color.rationale: Cyan interaction, orange accent and neutral surfaces communicate state with text and icons, never color alone.

iconography.rationale: Official Globe and Efeonce SVGs plus self-hosted Tabler icons render consistently from same-origin assets.

responsive.rationale: The exact 390 px composition is a genuine single-column layout with no horizontal overflow or clipped controls.

motion.rationale: Focus, hover and edit feedback are immediate; reduced motion preserves the same state and meaning.

fidelity.rationale: The rich fixture now demonstrates governed estimate, seed, negative constraint, authority gates, masonry, budget and actual viewer media.

genericTemplateResistance.rationale: Cross-modal composition, governed spend, route evidence, lineage and editorial masonry are specific to Globe rather than a generic dashboard.

conditionalFollowUps: Promote a durable visual baseline only with explicit operator approval.
Repeat the same scenario against the deployed runtime after dependent migrations, grants, flags, workers and providers are rolled out.
